record_types.name: Additional_Keypair
Config

fields.name: Require_OCSP_Stapling
fields.description:
Enable/disable various TLS versions.  Note that at least one must be
enabled.
Legacy TLS versions

fields.name: TLSv1_0
fields.description: Default TLS versions

fields.name: TLSv1_1
fields.description: Default TLS versions

fields.name: TLSv1_2
fields.description:
When negotiating the connection's ciphers, specify whether the
Client's request or the Server's request should be preferred.
Cipher_Preference only affects Server_Contexts.

fields.name: TLSv1_3
fields.description:
When negotiating the connection's ciphers, specify whether the
Client's request or the Server's request should be preferred.
Cipher_Preference only affects Server_Contexts.

fields.name: Cipher_Preference
fields.description: Should certificates be validated by a CA and OCSP?

fields.name: Verify_Certs
fields.description:
Should the server name field be verified?
Verify_Server_Name only affects Client_Contexts.

fields.name: Verify_Server_Name
fields.description: Should certificate's expiry not_before and not_after be verified?

fields.name: Verify_Expirys
fields.description: Set the filename that contains the CA root certificates.

fields.name: CA_File
fields.description: Set the directory that is searched for CA root certificate files.

fields.name: CA_Search_Path
fields.description:
Set the primary public and private keys
Optional for Client_Contexts, mandatory for Server_Contexts.

fields.name: Cert_File
fields.description:
Specify additional supplementary keypairs to be used alongside the
primary keypair.
Additional_Keypairs only affects Server_Contexts.

fields.name: Key_File
fields.description:
Specify additional supplementary keypairs to be used alongside the
primary keypair.
Additional_Keypairs only affects Server_Contexts.

fields.name: Additional_Keypairs
fields.description: Set the file containing the Certificate Revocation List

fields.name: CRL_File
fields.description:
Set the file containing the ER-encoded OCSP response to be stapled
during the TLS handshake.

fields.name: OCSP_Staple_File
fields.description:
Should client certificates be verified?
Verify_Client_Cert only affects Server_Contexts.

fields.name: Verify_Client_Cert
fields.description:
Set a limit on the number of intermediate certificates that will be
followed during certificate validation.

fields.name: Cert_Verify_Depth
fields.description:
----------------- !!!DANGEROUS!!! -------------------
 These fields should not typically need to be used --
       and can severely compromise security.       --
 No documentation is provided, refer to the libtls --
         and LibreSSL docs for information.        --
-----------------------------------------------------
 Refer to tls_config_set_dheparams()

fields.name: DHE_Parameters
fields.description: String directly passed to tls_config_set_alpn()

fields.name: ALPN_Protocols
fields.description: String directly passed to tls_config_set_ciphers()

fields.name: Ciphers
fields.description: String directly passed to tls_config_set_ecdhecurves()

generic_instantiations.name: Keypair_Vectors
generic_instantiations.code:
package Keypair_Vectors is new Ada.Containers.Vectors
		(Index_Type => Natural, Element_Type => Additional_Keypair);
